sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Character is at left edge, can't move further left
# Need to try clicking on pink/purple blocks at top

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("All objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ['B', 'G', 'p', 'W']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Try clicking on the pink/purple blocks at top
# From the image, they appear to be at rows 1-5, cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29
# Let me try clicking on the first one
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 3, 'col': 15}])
print(f"\nClick (3,15): gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over')}")

        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
